item.title: USA vs Bosnia and Herzegovina
item.description:
Wednesday, July 1, 2026 at 2 PM

Knock Out Rounds on the big screen? We're listening. Get ready to shout GOOOOOOAL with fellow fans under the open sky! We're streaming (the semi finals/ final) from this once-in-a-lifetime tournament on our 24-foot LED screen with the city skyline as your backdrop. Rock your team colors, grab a drink, and settle into seriously comfortable seats.

From Rooftop Cinema Club Houston

Event details

Event details

item.title: How to Lose a Guy in 10 Days
item.description:
Wednesday, July 8, 2026 at 2:15 PM

By midweek, we could all use a little pick-me-up. Wine Wednesdays are your perfect excuse to press pause on your problems and pour a glass instead. Each ticket includes a complimentary glass of house wine—so you can toast being halfway to the weekend with friends (or a very good date). Then sink into our ultra-comfortable seats and enjoy a fan-favorite film under the stars. Midweek meltdown? Best handled with a movie. 🍷🎬

From Rooftop Cinema Club Houston

Event details

Event details

item.title: Almost Famous
item.description:
Tuesday, July 28, 2026 at 2:15 PM

Between the iconic soundtrack, Kate Hudson's stellar performance as Penny Lane, and a breakout performance by complete unknown Patrick Fugit, Almost Famous makes us want to hop a tour bus and join the band! Come with us and be transported back to the 1970s gritty rock-and-roll era!

From Rooftop Cinema Club Houston

Event details
